consent.title: Before We Start Meme-ing...
consent.intro: This website is part of an architecture thesis project at Tel Aviv University.
consent.goalLine1: The goal: to examine how memes can change the way we see the city.
consent.goalLine2: Your participation helps develop a new visual language for discussing space.
consent.step1: Photograph your surroundings or choose from an existing template
consent.step2: Add your statement with text, emoji, description, tags and location
consent.step3: Publish to the public gallery (visible to everyone)
consent.checkboxLink: the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
